item.title: New baby announced on Melbourne breakfast radio show Fifi, Fev & Nick
item.description: ‘I’ve got a little exciting announcement myself.’

item.title: Record low? Not on our watch, say Wallabies
item.description: ‘We’re on the cusp of being a really good team.’

item.title: Federal government scrambles to reassure Australians over plan to increase pesticides on berries at farms
item.description: The farming chemicals regulator claims the pesticide levels would be safe despite critics raising doubts.

item.title: More than 500 feared dead after two boats carrying refugees sink off Myanmar
item.description: Refugees are continuing to make perilous maritime journeys in search of safety and better opportunities.

item.title: Cyclist rushed to hospital after eastern brown snake trapped in bike chain bites rider in Burringbar
item.description: Her last day on holidays took a dangerous turn on a popular rail trail.

item.title: South Australian MP Tony Pasin injured and staffer hospitalised after Tasmanian oyster tour hits a sandbar
item.description: The South Australian politician had been touring an oyster farm in Tasmania when the incident unfolded.

item.title: Devastating news for families of Aussie teens Bianca Jones and Holly Bowles who died from methanol poisoning in Laos
item.description: The 19-year-old girls died while holidaying in Laos after consuming drinks in a tourist town.

item.title: University of Queensland researchers trial neck exercises to prevent debilitating migraines
item.description: Millions of migraine sufferers could soon find relief from an unexpected place.

item.title: Parents of teen poisoned in Laos ‘crushed’ over lack of justice as government steps in
item.description: ‘I don’t even think devastated is a strong enough word.’

item.title: Telstra finally pinpoint cause of crippling nationwide network outage
item.description: The finger is being pointed at the telco giant’s servers in Melbourne, uncovered after days of investigation.

item.title: Donald Trump accuses China of election interference in primetime address
item.description: The US president used the remarks to justify his push to pass a strict voter ID bill in Congress.

item.title: Jackie ‘O’ Henderson accused of threatening ARN with harassment complaint to exit contract
item.description: Explosive claims have been made about the radio star by her former employer.

item.title: Luxury cars among $125 million in alleged criminal assets seized by SA Police under confiscation law reforms
item.description: ‘No one should be driving a Lamborghini ... funded by crimes that hurt South Australians.’

item.title: Lance Thompson’s daughter reveals in exclusive interview what claimed the NRL star’s life
item.description: For almost eight years, Lance Thompson’s death was publicly described as a medical episode.

item.title: Wok the Duck owners devastated after South Australian government earmarks site for demolition
item.description: The owners were only given 24 hours’ notice before the state government announced the decision.

item.title: Oscar-winning Irish actor Brenda Fricker dies aged 81
item.description: She is best known for her performances in the films My Left Foot and Home Alone 2.

item.title: Young basketballer’s update from hospital after five teens injured when car slammed into tree in East Tamworth
item.description: The young athlete was a passenger in a car carrying five teens when it slammed into a tree.

item.title: Connor Murphy: The truth about gold injections, why doctors used them and why experts warn against it
item.description: Claims of ‘superpowers’ have revived questions about gold’s surprising role in medicine.

item.title: West Indies cricket legend Sir Garfield Sobers dies aged 89
item.description: ‘There are champions ... then there are those rare individuals who redefine the meaning of greatness.’

item.title: Australian golfer Lucas Herbert leads British Open and in it to win it
item.description: The 30-year-old is now facing the biggest weekend of his life and admits he’s feeling anxious.

item.title: Bad memories: Wallabies on alert for Italy clash
item.description: Australia have lost twice in a row to Italy, but the Wallabies are vowing to make amends in Perth in a bid to farewell coach Joe Schmidt in style.

item.title: Smartraveller warns Australians to exercise ‘high degree of caution’ in Laos after shock alcohol poisoning punishments
item.description: Australian teenagers Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowles died after consuming a deadly batch of alcohol in 2024.

item.title: On-the-spot fine for controversial camping in Noosa carparks hiked up to $345
item.description: The punishment costs about as much as a week of legal, unpowered camping.

item.title: Cricket world reacts to death of much-loved icon Sir Garfield Sobers
item.description: ‘He didn’t say anything. He did not need to. There was no ego. His walk let the opposition know he was there for business.’

item.title: Golf superstar Bryson DeChambeau to play on in British Open despite fury over rule breach: ‘Don’t agree with it’
item.description: The 32-year-old has addressed reports that he might quit the tournament after being penalised for a serious rule breach.

item.title: Hooded immigration officers pin Australian to the ground in dramatic arrest at Las Vegas Airport
item.description: A statement from the immigration agency said they abandoned the arrest when ‘a crowd of anti-ICE agitators surrounded officers’.

item.title: Donald Trump threatens higher tariffs after accusing Canada over ‘unacceptable’ wildfire smoke
item.description: Heavy smoke has blanketed much of the nation with the president kicking off a bitter war of words over ‘willful negligence’.

item.title: Can you spot an AI deepfake? Researchers say they can train people to tell what is real and what is not
item.description: Images created by artificial intelligence are harder to detect than many believe. Here is what you need to look out for.

item.title: The iron lung is gone, polio isn’t: Why we must not forget the disease we’ve spent centuries trying to erase
item.description: Experts hope Martha Lillard’s story will remind a generation why vaccines matter.

item.title: Sideline brawl erupts in Wallabies coach Joe Schmidt’s big farewell victory over Italy
item.description: The referee dished out a red card as the Aussies’ second-worst coaching tenure ended on a high.

item.title: Two US soldiers killed, another missing after Iranian strikes on Jordan
item.description: The service member deaths mark the first American military fatalities since March.

item.title: Aussie underdog Lucas Herbert pulls off miracle shot to remain in British Open hunt
item.description: ‘I think that’s the best shot I’ve ever hit.’

item.title: Rory McIlroy slams Bryson DeChambeau for ‘performative’ antics after penalty drama
item.description: Rory McIlroy has accused Bryson DeChambeau of ‘holding the tournament hostage’ in an attention-seeking act.

item.title: History as Ken Hinkley confirmed as Tasmania’s inaugural AFL coach
item.description: The Devils have locked in their man with an official announcement expected on Monday.

item.title: Aussie basketball coach Sandy Brondello cops WNBA ban for using common footy term
item.description: ‘I regret that my words caused hurt to a community I respect so deeply.’

item.title: ‘Horrible’ discovery as anti-Indian content spreads on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: An Indian-Australian engineer started documented racist abuse online, with disturbing results.

item.title: Is Facebook down?: Social media website Facebook suffers major global outage on desktop devices
item.description: Thousands of Facebook users have been blocked from accessing their accounts on the social media network’s desktop website.

item.title: Australian expert tells how to navigate grief after loss
item.description: Four months after saying goodbye, Mel Schilling’s husband Gareth posted a touching tribute.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife’s Scarlett opens up about online bullying after Dylan leaves the show with Ally
item.description: Scarlett revealed the secret WhatsApp group that has helped her through the harsh criticism.

item.title: Verdict in as Justin Bieber’s ‘haunting song’ brings down World Cup half-time show
item.description: The Super Bowl-style performance took over the final but one superstar ‘completely killed the mood’.

item.title: Bobby Hill begins talks with Collingwood over ending contract
item.description: The Norm Smith medallist is open to continuing his career at another club.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife’s Yvonne leaves before Jarrad reveals final choice Brodie
item.description: ‘It felt more strategic.’

item.title: US and Iran intensify attacks as Israel warns missile fire could spill over
item.description: An interim ceasefire deal has further unravelled as strikes rock multiple countries.

item.title: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni ends press conference in tears after World Cup final: ‘I’m sorry’
item.description: Lionel Scaloni could not hold it back when one question triggered a lot of emotion.

item.title: Police detail final moments after armed driver dies following 65km pursuit
item.description: A witness has recalled hearing a ‘scraping’ noise before spotting a convoy of police cars during the dramatic chase.

item.title: WHO says almost half of dementia cases ‘preventable’ with new health guidelines
item.description: ‘These recommendations offer real-life actions that will reduce dementia risk.’

item.title: Papua New Guinea spotted at airport with rugby union code-swapper Joey Manu
item.description: Joey Manu has been out of the NRL since 2024 but a shock return could be on the cards.

item.title: Bali tattoo spelling blunder leaves Australian tourist red-faced
item.description: It took eight hours to get the ink etched across his chest — but there was one cringe-worthy mistake.

item.title: Football world turns on Argentina for ‘disgusting behaviour’ after World Cup defeat to Spain
item.description: Lionel Messi is his team’s only player who hasn’t been slammed for ‘embarrassing’ post-match antics.

item.title: Crime scene established after man found dead inside unit in Maroubra, Sydney’s east
item.description: Police were called to the unit following reports of a concern for welfare.

item.title: Mother of Australian soldier killed in Ukraine urges others to take up the fight: ‘These people need help’
item.description: Two years after dealing with the unimaginable heartbreak of the death of her child, Cassandra Parker has changed her mind about Australians going to fight.

item.title: Rapper and YouTuber Yung Filly on trial accused of raping young fan after Perth show
item.description: The entertainer was charged with sexually assaulting the woman after an Australian show.

item.title: Queensland family welcomes ‘one-in-15-million’ identical quadruplets
item.description: The naturally conceived birth is so rare doctors believe it may be an Australian first.

item.title: Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister, King Charles invites new Labour leader Andy Burnham to form government
item.description: Andy Burnham is set to become Britain’s seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Former Newcastle Knights player Scott Dureau dies aged 39 after lengthy health battle
item.description: The talented halfback spent four years in Australia before becoming an ‘icon’ in the Super League.

item.title: Perth couple caught up in mid-air drama over Middle East says plane nose dived, passengers were on edge
item.description: ‘You look out the window, there’s two ships on fire and you’ve just done three nose dives.’

item.title: Pauline Hanson boasts about one of the worst attendance records in Parliament
item.description: Official records reveal the One Nation leader has missed the equivalent of one full year of parliamentary sittings.

item.title: The Open 2026: Report claims Bryson DeChambeau wanted Donald Trump's help in rules drama
item.description: The American was handed a two-shot penalty during the second round.

item.title: Family of allegedly murdered Australian woman Meaghan Bowler fight to bring children home
item.description: ‘Meaghan can no longer fight for her children, so we will fight for her.’

item.title: Australian dementia patient backs World Health Organisation recommendations on how to halve cases
item.description: The World Health Organisation revealed almost 50 per cent of cases could be prevented with everyday lifestyle changes.

item.title: Dreamworld's massive expansion plan approved despite koala population concerns
item.description: ‘This is a win for tourism. It’s a win for jobs. It’s a win for housing. It’s a win for retail and hospitality industry.’

item.title: Barnaby Joyce dog interview: One Nation MP snaps in interview with ABC’s 730
item.description: One Nation’s star recruit bookended his day with fiery TV appearances.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Shocking footage captures dramatic at-sea brawl between Philippine sailors and Chinese Coast Guard
item.description: The violent encounter resulted in a Philippine sailor suffering a severe cut to his head.

item.title: Middle East war: US soldiers killed in latest strikes identified
item.description: Fighting has escalated following a breakdown in peace talks.

item.title: Outpouring of love as football icon Kevin Keegan dies aged 75 after cancer battle
item.description: ‘The former player and manager was surrounded by his wife and daughters ​in his final moments.’

item.description: The conservative activist was found dead at her home following a brutal attack.

item.title: Trump imposes 50 per cent tariff on Canadian imports citing ‘discriminatory treatment’
item.description: The US president’s bold move threatens to reignite a trade war.

item.title: Alice Ferrari: 11-year-old girl dies after hair was sucked into swimming pool pump while on holiday in Italy
item.description: The 11-year-old was on holiday with her family when she became trapped under shallow water.

item.title: Robbie Williams shoots down viral World Cup video with cheeky response
item.description: The UK singer was appearing on a live broadcast when a white object dropped onto his microphone.

item.title: Julie Goodwin’s simple coconut streusel cake is the ultimate winter afternoon tea treat
item.description: The MasterChef favourite shares her simple recipe for a moist coconut cake finished with a golden streusel topping and served with thick cream.

item.description: ‘The only thing history owes the dead is the truth.’

item.title: Who says ice cream is just for summer? Jacob Leung’s winter flavours will change your mind
item.description: Skip the supermarket tub and make your own with Jacob Leung’s sticky date and gingerbread ice cream recipe.

item.title: Cummins, Starc, Hazlewood, Lyon reunited after summer of injury as Aussies name squad to face Bangladesh
item.description: Australia have got their star bowling quartet back together but the toughest call was at the top of the order.

item.description: Why Duncan Lu says Vietnamese pho hot pot is the comforting winter meal that brings everyone together.

item.description: Sarah Di Lorenzo is giving three celebrity recipes a healthy makeover.

item.description: The ‘eye-for-an-eye’ move could send fuel prices soaring.

item.description: Celebrate World Lamington Day with homemade lamingtons.

item.title: Norway’s Prince Haakon shares update after Princess Mette-Marit discharged from hospital following lung transplant
item.description: Princess Mette-Marit has been battling chronic lung disease since 2018.

item.title: Essendon make approach to Brisbane footy boss Danny Daly amid ongoing coach search
item.description: The Bombers have sounded out a highly regarded figure at a rival powerhouse.

item.title: Melbourne school locked down as shotgun-wielding man causes chaos outside
item.description: The man crashed a stolen car metres from the school’s gates.

item.title: 2026 Jaecoo J8 SHS review
item.description: Jaecoo has added a new three-row PHEV that is absolutely loaded with kit, and it costs less than most rivals, too. What’s the catch?

item.description: The new flagship Haval SUV combines car-like underpinnings and Tank-like styling with plug-in hybrid power.

item.description: ‘Incidents of the heel detaching without warning have occurred.’

item.description: The teen’s sister is also in hospital with serious injuries.

item.description: There is one detail that has everyone talking after the Euphoria star recently went public with her relationship.

item.title: Family of young fire victim, Isabella Nicholls, share touching tribute
item.description: She leaves behind an infant son.

item.title: British singer Jessie J shares ‘difficult’ life update just months after beating breast cancer
item.description: ‘This is the easiest way to let people know the truth, before rumours circulate.’

item.title: Spanish teenager Lamine Yamal spotted praying while fight sours World Cup final’s post-match scenes
item.description: ‘This is THE image of this World Cup.’

item.description: ‘I don’t know either, because everyone’s got their own story and situation.’

item.title: 2026 Mazda CX-70 and CX-90: Prices slashed for large SUV duo
item.description: The Mazda CX-70 and CX-90 have received price cuts, with the latter also gaining more tech and minor design tweaks.

item.title: 2026 Mazda CX-60 updates: Tech and safety upgrades for up to $7000 less
item.description: Mazda has updated the CX-60 SUV with connected services and additional safety kit, while diesel and PHEV versions have been treated to price cuts.

item.title: Todd Carney and Susie Bradley split: Reality TV star reveals ‘betrayal’ behind separation from former NRL star
item.description: Susie Bradley has broken her silence on her split from former NRL star Todd Carney, revealing an alleged ‘betrayal’ behind their separation just months after the couple welcomed their second child.

item.title: BYD ups compensation to $3500 following build-date debacle
item.description: Those who unknowingly bought 2025-built BYDs have had their compensation increased by $2400, with the young brand determined to get on the front foot.

item.title: Schoolboy in emergency surgery after violent machete attack in Melbourne's southeast
item.description: The schoolboy was walking with two friends when they were set upon by a group armed with machetes and knives.

item.title: Collingwood coach Craig McRae sends emotional message to Bobby Hill: ‘If you’re out there’
item.description: ‘I haven’t seen Bobby in the building for a while.’

item.title: Outgoing GWS chief executive Dave Matthews walks back controversial comments about Tasmania: ‘Light hearted’
item.description: The outgoing CEO says there’s a simple ‘reality’ behind his position and his true thoughts on Tasmania haven’t changed.

item.title: Fresh photos emerge of AFL icon Tony Modra after major facial surgery
item.description: The AFL icon says he’s ‘slowly catching up on everything’ while sharing images of his new self with his family.

item.title: Family shattered after Melbourne mother Vicki Apostolopoulos stabbed to death by neighbour in front of her sons
item.description: ‘Since her death, I have been trapped in a living nightmare I cannot wake up from.’

item.title: Triple injury blow as South Sydney send Latrell Mitchell to specialist
item.description: The superstar is dealing with a ‘complex’ issue and ‘will remain a week-to-week proposition’.

item.title: Mercedes’ fanciest SUV just got fancier
item.description: The updated Mercedes-Maybach GLS gets a new and more powerful V8, revised steering and a quieter cabin, among other enhancements.

item.title: Second teen charged over allegedly setting fire to Cowra High School
item.description: Police allege the older boy filmed the act on Snapchat.

item.title: Holly Morton-Bowles and Bianca Jones: Foreign Minister Penny Wong presses Laos over backpacker methanol poisoning deaths
item.description: Penny Wong has expressed disappointment over Laos failing to press serious charges.

item.title: Mother and family friend die as husband and children escape blaze in Kingston
item.description: A neighbour said the home was engulfed in flames within minutes.

item.title: Aussie athletics team tunes up in Barcelona with plans for a Commonwealth Games medal rush
item.description: The team is creating a family bond but have also spilled on an ‘unspoken rivalry’.

item.title: RSPCA investigates death of birds trapped in gel at Brisbane shopping centre car park
item.description: The centre said it would work with animal welfare to understand what happened.

item.title: Woman allegedly raped by Yung Filly after Perth show tells court ‘he was my idol’
item.description: A young woman allegedly sexually assaulted by a UK entertainer has told a court the rapper was her hero.

item.title: Mick Malthouse: Shocking photos reveal AFL great’s injuries during alleged Melbourne home invasion
item.description: Mick Malthouse was allegedly attacked after confronting three men trying force their way into his apartment.

item.title: Retired deputy principal Neil Morrison on trial for raping student at school on NSW south coast
item.description: The 69-year-old is accused of using an overnight camp to assault a student as other pupils slept nearby.

item.title: Tyson Stengle’s Geelong career ‘over’ but tricky legal discussions remain
item.description: ‘If they had their time again, would they have handled things differently?’

item.title: TV star Georgie Parker leads push to protect vulnerable Australians from winter viruses, including RSV
item.description: One of country’s most familiar faces is leading a push to make sure older Australians are prepared.

item.title: New Tassie coach Ken Hinkley sends cheeky message to Hawthorn star Jack Ginnivan
item.description: Ken Hinkley did not a miss beat when a curly question about the Hawthorn star was thrown his way.
